summary: Manual implementation review approved GH-170 Task Thread content migration at head 31ac5821631cbac2b2cfb9d2d025b33c306275d3. The implementation extracts Task Thread page, composer, right inspector, and shared source-field primitives; App is reduced to shell orchestration; existing #93/#94/#95 fixture semantics remain visible inside the Codex-like shell. It does not approve GH-171 fidelity QA, Stage 5, live Core/Harbor/Lode calls, real task submission, real run record truth, or real function/data contracts. Post-review drift after this record must remain limited to GH-170 review carriers or PR metadata.
reviewed_validation_summary: Reviewed renderer diff and packaged screenshot after migration. `npm run build`, `WEBENVOY_PACKAGED_SMOKE_SCREENSHOT=artifacts/gh-170-task-thread-migration.png npm run smoke:packaged`, `git diff --check`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-170 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-170 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-170 --json` passed.
follow_ups: Open PR with before/after screenshots and Codex restored references.
After GH-170 merge/closeout, continue GH-171 fidelity QA before parent #167 closeout.
Keep current fixture data and component boundaries as preview scaffolding only, not implementation contracts.
